generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-based occupancy sensor deployed in physical building spaces to detect presence and occupancy patterns for real-time monitoring and adaptive control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring temperature and humidity levels in building zones, feeding real-time environmental data for comfort optimization and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring ambient light levels to support adaptive lighting control and energy optimization through reinforcement learning policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightLevelDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT-enabled energy meter tracking real-time electricity consumption across building systems, integrated with BIM models for operational optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

instance PostOccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized sensor capturing post-occupancy data (e.g., user feedback, space utilization) to iteratively refine control policies via BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedData PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LightLevelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

instance PostOccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PostOccupancySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimEnrichedSemanticModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations, control logic) for runtime capabilities, serving as foundational backbone for DT operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data ingested from IoT sensors and BCS devices via Eclipse Hono/Ditto, normalized for DT processing and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightLevelDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted, PostOccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance UnrealEngine5VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive visualization model in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive facility management, supporting real-time monitoring and stakeholder collaboration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Enabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control model implementing BOREALIS reinforcement learning policies for adaptive energy and comfort optimization across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RuleBasedControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Rule-based control logic (TwinLight) for automated commissioning and bidirectional communication with BCS devices, embedded in BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering framework automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM and generating runtime interfaces for DT deployment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, ControlAutomationService
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono providing edge-to-cloud connectivity for real-time data exchange between IoT devices and DT runtime environment."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, DataIngestionService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto enabling digital twin management with standardized data models and bidirectional communication between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService, ControlAutomationService, LifeCycleManagementService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform supporting rich, interactive 3D visualization for facility management and stakeholder collaboration."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service using Unreal Engine 5 for immersive real-time facility monitoring and operational oversight."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service integrating BOREALIS reinforcement learning for adaptive energy and comfort optimization across building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, ComfortOptimizationInsight, AdaptiveControlAction
]

instance ControlAutomationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated commissioning service with bidirectional communication to BCS devices (TwinLight) for real-time control adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedCommissioningAction, BidirectionalControlAction
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated data ingestion service handling real-time sensor data streams via Eclipse Hono/Ditto with semantic consistency validation."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataValidationInsight
]

instance LifeCycleManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Life cycle management service supporting design-to-operation transitions, refurbishment, and adaptive management throughout building asset lifecycle."
    DTDFVocab:provides RefurbishmentRecommendationInsight, AdaptiveManagementAction
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular service extension framework enabling integration of third-party analytics, simulation tools, or domain-specific plugins via standardized extension points."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomIntegrationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building operations in real-time for facility managers and stakeholders."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for energy consumption reduction through reinforcement learning-based optimization policies."
]

instance ComfortOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive adjustments to environmental conditions (temperature, lighting) for improved occupant comfort based on real-time data."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early detection of equipment failures through real-time monitoring and anomaly detection in operational data streams."
]

instance DataValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of data synchronization fidelity between physical sensors and virtual representations using metadata consistency checks."
]

instance RefurbishmentRecommendationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable recommendations for building refurbishment based on operational performance data and lifecycle analysis."
]

instance CustomIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integration points for third-party tools and analytics via standardized extension framework."
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated configuration and validation of BCS devices based on BIM-derived control logic."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BidirectionalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time bidirectional communication between DT and physical BCS actuators for dynamic control adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control policies (lighting, HVAC) based on occupancy patterns and external conditions via reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveManagementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Runtime configuration updates to DT models without redeployment, enabling continuous adaptation to changing operational requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System (BCS) actuator for adaptive lighting control, integrated with TwinLight framework for bidirectional communication."
]

instance HvacActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators receiving real-time control signals from DT for energy-efficient climate management."
]

instance ShadingMechanismActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adaptive shading mechanisms controlled via DT to optimize natural light utilization and reduce energy consumption."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin environment representing the entire building infrastructure from design to operation."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual world to the physical world involve **control signals and commands** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the BCS and actuators. This includes:
  - **Automated control logic execution** (e.g., adaptive lighting adjustments, HVAC optimization) derived from real-time data and reinforcement learning models (as in BOREALIS).
  - **Bidirectional middleware integration** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto to push control signals to physical devices (e.g., lighting dimmers, ventilation systems).
  - **Runtime configuration management** to adjust control policies without redeployment, enabling dynamic adaptation to operational changes."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time and near-real-time scales**, with synchronization frequencies determined by the criticality of the monitored/controlled systems. Key time-scale considerations include:
  - **Continuous data ingestion** from sensors (e.g., environmental sensors updating every few seconds to minutes).
  - **Periodic control adjustments** (e.g., lighting or HVAC reconfigurations triggered by occupancy or energy targets).
  - **Long-term adaptive learning** (e.g., BOREALIS’s reinforcement learning iteratively refines control policies over weeks/months).
  The framework ensures **low-latency synchronization** via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for time-sensitive applications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  - **BIM Core**: Semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data.
  - **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto for real-time data synchronization.
  - **Control Layer**: Embedded control logic (e.g., reinforcement learning, rule-based systems).
  - **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  - **Extension Layer**: Modular services integrated via standardized interfaces.
  The constellation ensures **interoperability** across heterogeneous systems and supports **scalable deployment** for large-scale infrastructures."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following life cycle stages of the physical building:
  - **Design phase**: Integration with BIM models to represent the **as-designed** state.
  - **Construction phase**: Validation and adaptation of the DT to reflect **as-manufactured** deviations.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time synchronization with **as-operated** data, including adaptive adjustments and predictive maintenance.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: Support for dynamic updates to the DT to reflect physical modifications or evolving requirements."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Automated synchronization**: Real-time data exchange via Eclipse Hono/Ditto minimizes drift between PT and DT.
  - **ODTE metric**: Quantifies the **entanglement** (alignment) between the DT and its physical counterpart.
  - **Validation mechanisms**: Model validation steps (e.g., checking for semantic consistency before deployment).
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Middleware (Ditto) supports probabilistic data models for uncertain or noisy sensor inputs."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the PT and DT includes:
  - **Network protocols**: Eclipse Hono uses **MQTT/AMQP** for lightweight, scalable IoT communication.
  - **Middleware integration**: Eclipse Ditto provides **standardized digital twin data models** and **bidirectional API endpoints**.
  - **Edge-to-cloud architecture**: Hono acts as a **protocol adapter** for heterogeneous IoT devices, while Ditto manages twin state synchronization.
  - **Data normalization**: Automated extraction of device metadata from BIM ensures consistent data schemas."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **modular, cloud-native deployment** with:
  - **Containerized services**: Eclipse Hono/Ditto deployed as microservices for scalability.
  - **Unreal Engine 5**: Runs on high-performance workstations or cloud-based rendering platforms for visualization.
  - **Standardized extension points**: Allow deployment of custom services in isolated containers or as plugins.
  The framework supports **hybrid deployment** (on-premise/cloud) to accommodate varying infrastructure constraints."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration involves:
  - **External information systems**: Compatibility with **BIM standards (e.g., IFC, COBie)** for data exchange with other AECO tools.
  - **IoT platforms**: Interoperability with third-party sensor networks or building automation systems.
  - **Analytics platforms**: Integration with **reinforcement learning frameworks** (BOREALIS) or **simulation tools** for advanced analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **BIM standards**: Integration with **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** and **Construction Operations Building Information Exchange (COBie)** for semantic interoperability.
  - **IoT protocols**: Compliance with **MQTT/AMQP** for lightweight, scalable communication.
  - **Digital Twin frameworks**: Alignment with **Eclipse Ditto’s** standardized digital twin data models.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE)**: Uses **metamodels and transformations** to ensure consistency across deployment artifacts."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Data encryption**: Secure transmission of sensor/control data via Eclipse Hono’s **TLS/SSL** support.
  - **Access control**: Role-based authentication for facility managers, engineers, and DT developers.
  - **Safety protocols**: Validation of control signals before execution to prevent unintended physical actions.
  - **Redundancy**: Middleware (Ditto) supports **state replication** to ensure resilience against failures.
  The framework does not explicitly address **remote operation safety** for human-inhabited spaces, though bidirectional validation mitigates risks."
]
